title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates:
Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath Asia Pacific Associates!
